ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a star graph in Cypher'})-[r1:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {uuid: 123}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'cypher'}),
    p3 = (a)-[r3:PROVIDED]->(u:User {uuid: 456})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What impact does the accepted answer for the question about building a star graph in Cypher have on the engagement metrics of the user who provided it, given the tag 'cypher' is also present in the question?

cypher: MATCH (q:Question {title: 'building a star graph in Cypher'})<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer {is_accepted: true})<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q2:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'cypher'})\nRETURN u.display_name, q.view_count, q.answer_count
